[FIX-5.0SP2] Tag 1043 (CollApplType) [Optional] — Differentiates collateral pledged specifically against a
position from collateral pledged against an entire
portfolio on a valued basis.

In Futures this may be "interest rates", "agricultural",
"equity indexes", etc
